content: Phase 2: Backend - all routers, services, access control (VERIFIED)
Design guidelines + Frontend - all 9 pages, charts, dark mode, auth
Phase 2: End-to-end testing (Backend 100% 35/35, Frontend ~95% 13/13, zero bugs)
Phase 3: Stripe subscriptions + access control (checkout works, exports/contact gated) - verified in testing
Phase 4: Delivery artifacts (docker-compose, .env.example, scripts/seed.py, Dockerfiles, nginx, README) - DONE & seed verified
